title: Varied Tools
description: Adds tool variants for each wood type.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MlwLlUPjAgw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Ever wondered why every block and item in the game made of wood has different variations for each wood type, except wooden tools? (and bookshelves, but that's besides the point)

Varied Tools is here! Just craft a wooden tool normally, and the type of tool will change with the wood used. The tools are functionally identical, even letting you combine ones from different wood types to repair!

There's also types for Blackstone and Deepslate for stone tools!

Why are you still reading this? Download now!
